item.title: Role of itaconate in intestinal disease (Review).
item.description: International journal of molecular medicine - Systematic review - Itaconate (ITA) is a metabolite produced by immune cells such as macrophages during inflammation or infection. ITA exhibits potent immunomodulatory functions, antioxidant effects and antibacterial ...

item.title: Multi-omics reveal vitamin D regulation of immune-gut microbiome interactions and tolerogenic pathways in inflammatory bowel disease.
